question:
Zumpuses are not spicy. Each yumpus is cold. Yumpuses are impuses. Every impus is red. Impuses are jompuses. Every jompus is not feisty. Every jompus is a rompus. Rompuses are angry. Each rompus is a wumpus. Each wumpus is spicy. Wumpuses are vumpuses. Vumpuses are not small. Vumpuses are numpuses. Numpuses are earthy. Numpuses are tumpuses. Every tumpus is luminous. Tumpuses are dumpuses. Sally is a yumpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Sally is spicy.
